extraction.one_line_summary: HINDLEY Jai attacked inside final 5km on Marmolada using teammate KÄMNA as pace satellite, cracking CARAPAZ to gain 1:25 before final TT
tactical_patterns: KÄMNA placed in 15-rider breakaway as deliberate satellite, perfectly positioned inside 5km for HINDLEY's pink jersey attack.
BAHRAIN positioned both NOVAK and DORFMAN in break, dual-purpose for stage hunting and potential LANDA support on Marmolada.
INEOS only initiated pace with 5km remaining on final climb, allowing break 6-minute gap but concentrating firepower.
HINDLEY's attack timed to use KÄMNA as pacemaker before dropping him, exploiting teammate energy rather than solo effort.

rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: negative: catastrophic collapse inside final 3km despite only 3-second deficit, suggesting overtrain or illness not just bad legs
rider_signals.KÄMNA Leonard: positive: breakaway placement reveals BORA tactical sophistication, willing to sacrifice GC domestique early for final-climb advantage
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: positive: passed imploding CARAPAZ to move within podium range at 1:51, proving stage 19 recovery superior to INEOS leader
rider_signals.BUCHMANN Emanuel: negative: dropped immediately when pace lifted at 5km, confirmed as spent force after earlier GC efforts
rider_signals.NOVAK Domen: positive: cut 90-second gap to COVVI down to 30 seconds solo, showing BAHRAIN has stage-hunting depth beyond LANDA
